rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes sweeping logical leaps—e.g., 'eliminates self-preference bias across model families' is asserted on a single (judge, corpus) instantiation; checking premise-to-conclusion coherence is central to any plausible interpretation of 'review'.
rationale.R1.3: Dense quantitative claims (mean scores, kappa rise, pairwise rate) must be cross-checked against the experimental design described in the same passage; mismatches would undermine the section's core contribution.
rationale.R1.6: Writing quality is universally in-scope for 'review this section'; sentence-level issues (e.g., redundant restatement of results in the closing paragraph) are directly actionable.
